is_p_falciparum.evidence: This study investigates Plasmodium vivax resistance to chloroquine in Madagascar; it analyzes pvcrt-o and pvmdr1 (P. vivax genes), not P. falciparum. Two P. falciparum infections during follow-up were excluded.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports mutations in pvmdr1 (P. vivax) e.g. Y976F, S513R, and pvcrt-o. These are P. vivax orthologs, not the curated P. falciparum codon positions (Pfcrt, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1 86, etc.).

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 6 gives per-site allele frequencies (e.g., S513R 96.3%, Y976F 98.8%) with numerators and denominators — but for pvmdr1, not P. falciparum markers.

sub_country_location.evidence: Frequencies reported by region/site (South, West, Central Highlands; six sentinel sites: Ejeda, Ihosy, Tsiroanomandidy, Moramanga/Saharevo, Maevatanana, Miandrivazo).

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected in 2006 (Feb–June 2006), a single-year window.

african_field_samples.evidence: Clinical isolates collected from patients at sentinel sites in Madagascar, an African country.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical study with clinical trial, sequencing, and field collection.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Acknowledgments: 'samples were obtained' from 'the national network for the surveillance of malaria resistance in Madagascar (Réseau d'Etude de la Résistance [RER])' — a surveillance network.

supplement.evidence: Frequency data are in main text tables (Table 6, 7, 8); no missing supplementary data needed.

assessment.summary: Study of Plasmodium vivax chloroquine resistance in Madagascar, analyzing pvmdr1 and pvcrt-o genes. It reports P. vivax markers only, not P. falciparum drug-resistance markers, so it fails the species and target-marker criteria.
exclusion_reasons: Study is of Plasmodium vivax, not P. falciparum
Reports pvmdr1/pvcrt-o (P. vivax ortholog) markers, none of the curated P. falciparum drug-resistance codon positions
